videos.title: visionOS 27 Betas with Devon Dundee (Vision Pros - 0069)
videos.description:
Devon Dundee is writing the MacStories review again this year for visionOS. We dive into our two weeks with the beta and discuss what tool he is going to use to gather notes and write the review. 

Early episodes are available by supporting the podcast at www.visionpros.fm/patreon. 

Early episodes are also now available in Apple Podcasts!

Show notes are available at www.VisionPros.fm. Feedback is welcomed at tim@visionpros.fm.

Links:
- https://devondundee.com
- https://mastodon.social/@devond

videos.title: WWDC 26 Aftermath with Riley Hill (iPad Pros - 0252)
videos.description:
Riley Hill and Tim Chaten discuss our experiences using beta 1 of iPadOS 27 and some thoughts about the announcements a week later. 

Early episodes are available by supporting the podcast at www.patreon.com/ipadpros.
